name: cadence-ai
description: Marketplace for the Cadence plugin: opinionated, gated workflow for solo development with Claude

plugins.name: cadence
plugins.description: Opinionated, gated workflow for solo development with Claude: conversate, brainstorm, refine, breakdown, spec, sprint-plan, work, and review epics, stories, and tasks on a file-based board, plus independent debugging and code review, with a persistent, Obsidian-linked knowledge brain.
